baseAudioUrl.title: Base Audio URL
baseAudioUrl.description: Public URL of the base audio file. Its duration determines the total duration of the output — regardless of the length of the overlaid tracks.

overlays.title: Overlay Tracks
overlays.description: List of audio files to mix on top of the base audio. Each one starts playing at its own startTimeSec. Supports any format (mp3, wav, ogg, flac, aac, etc.).

audioUrl.title: Overlay Audio URL
audioUrl.description: Public URL of the audio file to overlay on the base track (mp3, wav, ogg, flac, aac, opus, etc.).

startTimeSec.title: Start Time (seconds)
startTimeSec.description: The point in the output (in seconds from the start) at which this overlay begins playing. Must be >= 0.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: Format of the output audio file. Input tracks can be in any format — they are automatically converted by FFmpeg.
